items.headline: Gordon heads to IL (hip impingement); Agnos recalled

news_items.headline: Chapman’s 10th-inning single gives the Giants a 2-1 win over the Cubs
news_items.summary: Matt Chapman singled to drive in automatic runner Jonah Cox in the 10th inning, lifting the San Francisco Giants over the Chicago Cubs 2-1 for their fourth win in their last five games.

news_items.headline: Cubs’ Jameson Taillon says he’s headed to IL after leaving vs. Giants with hamstring injury
news_items.summary: Taillon said he first felt discomfort in the hamstring after throwing an inside changeup to Matt Chapman.

news_items.headline: Yankees’ Jazz Chisholm Jr. borrows Aaron Judge’s bat, puts Red Sox away with late-inning homer
news_items.summary: Jazz Chisholm Jr. found a way to keep Aaron Judge’s bat in the Yankees’ lineup.

news_items.headline: Latest Power Rankings has an All-Star ballot twist
Options for the Tigers to replace Jahmai Jones
news_items.summary: It’s time to re-work the bench and stop wasting a roster spot on a guy who can’t do the one thing he’s here to do.

news_items.headline: Mets bounce back, close final West Coast road trip with series win in San Diego
news_items.summary: Instead of sitting and sulking following a tough loss, the Mets were able to come back on Sunday and put together a complete effort to head home with the series victory over the Padres.

news_items.headline: 1 trade chip for every team ahead of 2026 Deadline
Mets’ Francisco Alvarez reaches twice, Tobias Myers takes home win with Triple-A Syracuse
news_items.summary: Francisco Alvarez was back behind the plate as he continued his rehab assignment on Sunday afternoon with Triple-A Syracuse.

news_items.headline: Carson Benge’s five-hit day another sign of the ‘special player’ he can be
news_items.summary: Mets rookie Carson Benge just continues to progress at the big-league level, and Sunday was arguably his strongest showing to this point.
